data.content: Implementation review rejected (2nd time): The reported error is at /Users/cartine/.local/bin/foolery:110, the installed launcher generated by scripts/install.sh. install.sh already uses printf '%s' '->' (lines 78, 297) — it was fixed in a prior change. The PR only fixes scripts/setup.sh and scripts/agent-wizard.sh, which are separate scripts that don't produce the error in the bug report. Additionally, the branch includes unrelated feature work (Refine Scope button, new API route). The root cause is likely: (a) the user's installed launcher is from an older version and needs reinstall, or (b) the upgrade path doesn't regenerate the launcher script. Next implementer should investigate whether 'foolery stop' -> upgrade check path triggers the launcher's own icon function (line 110) or the install.sh upgrade path, and fix accordingly.
